debug_info.goal:
rec :
  (P Q : Prop) →
    (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) →
      ((hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp)) →
        ((hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) → (h : Disjunction P Q) → motive h
comp_left :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hp : P),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.left P Q hp) = h_left hp
comp_right :
  ∀ (P Q : Prop) (motive : Disjunction P Q → Type) (h_left : (hp : P) → motive (Disjunction.left P Q hp))
    (h_right : (hq : Q) → motive (Disjunction.right P Q hq)) (hq : Q),
    rec P Q motive h_left h_right (Disjunction.right P Q hq) = h_right hq
⊢ False

proof:
let m := fun (_ : Disjunction True True) => Bool
  have h1 := comp_left True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  exact Bool.noConfusion (h1.symm.trans h2)
failed_attempts:
let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h : f (left True.intro) = f (right True.intro) := rfl
  rw [comp_left, comp_right] at h
  cases h

let m _ := Type
  let hL _ := PUnit
  let hR _ := Empty
  have h1 := comp_left True True m hL hR True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True m hL hR True.intro
  exact Empty.elim ((h1.symm.trans h2).mp ())

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => PUnit) (fun _ => Empty)
  let h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => PUnit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  let h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => PUnit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  exact (h2 ▸ h1 ▸ (rfl : f (left True.intro) = f (right True.intro)) ▸ PUnit.unit).elim

have h : Bool = Unit := by
    rw [← comp_left True True (λ _ => Type) (λ _ => Bool) (λ _ => Unit) True.intro,
        ← comp_right True True (λ _ => Type) (λ _ => Bool) (λ _ => Unit) True.intro]
  have h_all : ∀ b1 b2 : Bool, b1 = b2 := by intro b1 b2; rw [h]; cases b1; cases b2; rfl
  cases h_all true false
  done

let motive := fun _ : Disjunction True True => Type
  have h := (comp_left True True motive (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro).symm.trans
            (comp_right True True motive (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro)
  exact (cast h ()).elim

let motive := fun _ => Prop
  let hl := fun _ => True
  let hr := fun _ => False
  exact (comp_left True True motive hl hr True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True motive hl hr True.intro) ▸ True.intro

let motive := fun _ : Disjunction True True => Type
  let hl := fun _ => PUnit
  let hr := fun _ => Empty
  have e1 := comp_left True True motive hl hr True.intro
  have e2 := comp_right True True motive hl hr True.intro
  exact (cast (e1.symm.trans e2) PUnit.unit).elim

let f := rec True True (λ _ => Bool) (λ _ => true) (λ _ => false)
  let v1 := comp_left _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  let v2 := comp_right _ _ _ _ _ True.intro
  have h : true = false := v1.symm.trans ((congr_arg f (rfl : left True.intro = right True.intro)).trans v2)
  cases h

have h : rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (left True.intro) =
           rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) (right True.intro) := rfl
  rw [comp_left, comp_right] at h
  cases h

have h : Bool = Empty := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro)
  exact (cast h true).elim

have h : Bool.true = Bool.false := by
    rw [← comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => Bool.true) (fun _ => Bool.false) True.intro]
    rw [← comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => Bool.true) (fun _ => Bool.false) True.intro]
  contradiction
  done

have h : rec True True (fun _ => Prop) (fun _ => True) (fun _ => False) (left True.intro) =
           rec True True (fun _ => Prop) (fun _ => True) (fun _ => False) (right True.intro) := rfl
  rw [comp_left, comp_right] at h
  exact h ▸ True.intro

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => PUnit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => PUnit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro
  exact (cast (h1.symm.trans h2) PUnit.unit).elim

have e : Unit = Empty := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Type) (fun _ => Unit) (fun _ => Empty) True.intro)
  exact (cast e ()).elim
successful_attempts:
let m := fun (_ : Disjunction True True) => Bool
  have h1 := comp_left True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  exact Bool.noConfusion (h1.symm.trans h2)

have h : true = false := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

let motive : Disjunction True True → Type := fun _ => Bool
  have eq : true = false := (comp_left True True motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True motive (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases eq
  done

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) trivial
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) trivial
  have h := h1.symm.trans h2
  cases h

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h3 : true = false := h1.symm.trans h2
  cases h3

have h : true = false := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

have h : true = false := (comp_left True True (λ _ => Bool) (λ _ => true) (λ _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (λ _ => Bool) (λ _ => true) (λ _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

have e1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have e2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  cases e1.symm.trans e2

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  cases h1.symm.trans h2

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  cases h1.symm.trans h2

let f := rec True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false)
  have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  cases h1.symm.trans (congrArg f (rfl : left True.intro = right True.intro) |>.trans h2)

have h : true = false := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

have h : true = false := (comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

let m (_ : Disjunction True True) := Bool
  have h : true = false := (comp_left True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True m (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro)
  cases h

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  cases h1.symm.trans h2
  done

have h1 := comp_left True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True (fun _ => Bool) (fun _ => true) (fun _ => false) True.intro
  exact Bool.noConfusion (h1.symm.trans h2)

let motive := fun (_ : Disjunction True True) => Bool
  have h1 := comp_left True True motive (fun _ => Bool.true) (fun _ => Bool.false) True.intro
  have h2 := comp_right True True motive (fun _ => Bool.true) (fun _ => Bool.false) True.intro
  have h3 : (right True.intro : Disjunction True True) = left True.intro := rfl
  rw [h3, h1] at h2
  contradiction

exact cast ((comp_left True True (fun _ => Prop) (fun _ => True) (fun _ => False) ⟨⟩).symm.trans
    (comp_right True True (fun _ => Prop) (fun _ => True) (fun _ => False) ⟨⟩)) ⟨⟩
